overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic dystopian city during a heavy rainstorm at night. The journey transitions from covered elevated highways with neon lighting down to open highways and finally city streets with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with neon ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway maintaining speed with surrounding traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: futuristic concrete and metal overhead structure with geometric support beams
rows of teal and cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling
massive concrete pillars supporting the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered elevated highway section with distinctive teal neon ceiling lights illuminating the wet road. The enclosed structure creates a tunnel-like atmosphere with moderate traffic visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with concrete barriers

events.description: exits the covered highway structure into open air with heavy rain visible

agents.ego_description: changing lanes and adjusting to open highway conditions while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated highway
large directional signs suspended over the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered structure onto an open elevated highway exposed to heavy rain. Concrete barriers line the sides while the camera navigates through moderate traffic under artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving elevated highway ramp with safety barriers

events.description: vehicle navigates sharp right curve while descending elevation

agents.ego_description: navigating curved highway ramps and descending from elevated position

entered.detail: yellow and black directional arrow signs indicating curve direction
concrete pillars passing by closely on the left side

segments.scene_description: The highway curves sharply to the right as the vehicle descends from the elevated section. Chevron signs mark the curve while concrete barriers pass by closely on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp transitioning to city intersection

events.description: exits highway onto ramp with chevron markings approaching city streets
approaches intersection with traffic lights and pedestrian crossings

agents.ego_description: exiting the highway and navigating through city intersections with traffic control

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements and corporate signage on buildings
futuristic high-rise structures with illuminated windows
tall street lighting poles along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway via a marked ramp and enters the city street grid. Neon billboards and futuristic buildings become visible while pedestrians with umbrellas appear on the sidewalks near intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with gas station and neon signage

events.description: passes illuminated gas station with price displays on the left

agents.ego_description: cruising through city streets passing commercial establishments and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: red vehicle ahead stopped at traffic light

entered.detail: futuristic fuel station with illuminated price signs and canopy
commercial buildings with bright neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the rainy city streets passing a gas station with bright neon signage. The urban environment features wet roads reflecting neon lights, scattered pedestrians, and futuristic commercial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a neon-lit enclosed tunnel onto an open, rain-drenched highway. It begins within a covered elevated section where teal neon ceiling lights reflect off the wet road, creating a claustrophobic, tunnel-like atmosphere amidst moderate traffic. As the vehicle emerges from the structure, the environment opens up to a heavy downpour, shifting the lighting to a broader artificial glow against concrete barriers. The scene then transitions as the highway curves sharply to the right, with chevron signs flashing past while the vehicle descends from the elevated roadway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle descends from a highway into the neon-drenched heart of a rainy dystopian city. It begins by exiting the highway via a marked ramp, where the enclosed road gives way to an open city street grid filled with towering futuristic buildings and glowing billboards. As the vehicle enters the urban flow, the environment becomes more populated with pedestrians holding umbrellas along the sidewalks near intersections. The scene then shifts further into the city center, passing a brightly lit gas station while the wet asphalt begins to mirror the vivid neon signage of the surrounding commercial architecture. Finally, the camera glides through the rain-slicked streets, immersed in the reflections and dense atmosphere of the futuristic metropolis.
